calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-27-2006 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:
GENEVIE GALLEGOS, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Carlos Galvez
EDWARD HUNG, Esq. on behalf of defendant Champion Steam Cleaning, Inc.

This matter settled after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendants Champion Steam Cleaning, Inc., Isaac Tang, individually and dba M.J. Restaurant Service Company to pay plaintiff Carlos Galvez the sum of $8,000.00 within 15 days of this date. After receipt of payment, the plaintiff will dismissal all defendants. Each side to bear their own costs. All parties agreed to the settlement on the record.

Judge Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: Vera Mu/JIRoque; Reporter: Susan Murphy, CSR 328 (206)
